# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2019-07-01",
      "name": "vm1",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [],
      "properties": {
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "vm1",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        },
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "[parameters('imagePublisher')]",
            "offer": "[parameters('imageOffer')]",
            "sku": "[parameters('imageSku')]",
            "version": "latest"
          },
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage"
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic1')]"
            }
          ]
        },
        "diagnosticsProfile": {
          "bootDiagnostics": {
            "enabled": "true",
            "storageUri": "[parameters('bootDiagnosticsStorageUri')]"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2019-07-01",
      "name": "publicIP1",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2019-07-01",
      "name": "nic1",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIpAddresses', 'publicIP1')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIpAddresses', 'publicIP1')]"
              },
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[variables('subnetRef')]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "parameters": {
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Username for the Virtual Machine"
      }
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Password for the Virtual Machine"
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Size of the VM"
      }
    },
    "imagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Publisher of the VM image"
      }
    },
    "imageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Offer of the VM image"
      }
    },
    "imageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Sku of the VM image"
      }
    },
    "bootDiagnosticsStorageUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "URI for boot diagnostics storage account"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subnetRef": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'vnet1', 'subnet1')]"
  }
}
